final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) wellness content about sleep tips.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, unified aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3-column × 3-row grid layout with clear boundaries between all 9 cells, each cell centered and self-contained, no text near cut lines, visible spacing or thin borders between cells
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with specific content:
  Cell 1 (Cover): main title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", with soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask elements
  Cell 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", with phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", with bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", with air conditioner, thermometer, blanket
  Cell 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", with coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", with bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", with notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", with clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", with breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: needs a cohesive wellness lifestyle setting — exact environment details are yours
Lighting/medium: needs a soft, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include cream white, light beige, pale oat, light caramel as main tones, with small amounts of dark brown text — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a gentle, tactile surface treatment with light skeuomorphic illustrations — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified in Subject field above, all text must be Chinese, clear and readable, no garbled characters, no English
Constraints: must preserve 3:4 vertical aspect ratio suitable for Xiaohongshu, 9 cells must be evenly divided, each cell must work as standalone image when cropped, magazine-quality layout, professional new media design aesthetic, large readable text, comfortable whitespace, gentle healing color scheme, no cheap marketing feel, not overly flashy
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing aesthetics, overly flashy decorations, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid lines
